opencli.message: OpenCLI artifact has a non-publishable 'info.title' value.

xmldoc.message:
Cannot convert value "<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Model>
  <!--AUDIO-->
  <Command Name="audio" IsBranch="true" 
Settings="Spectre.Console.Cli.CommandSettings">
    <Description>Audio file formats</Description>
    <!--VAB-->
    <Command Name="vab" IsBranch="true" 
Settings="Spectre.Console.Cli.CommandSettings">
      <Description>VAB and VH/VB audio format</Description>
      <!--EXPORT-->
      <Command Name="export" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="SceneGate.Hinox.Utils.Audio.ExportSingleVabCommand" 
Settings="SceneGate.Hinox.Utils.Audio.ExportSingleVabCommand+Settings">
        <Description>Extract the audios from a VAB or VH/VB format</Description>
        <Parameters>
          <Option Short="" Long="files" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
            <Description>Optional path to a previously exported files.yml for 
having custom names when exporting</Description>
          </Option>
          <Option Short="o" Long="output" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
            <Description>Path to the directory to write the output 
files.</Description>
          </Option>
          <Option Short="" Long="support-non-compliant" Value="NULL" 
Required="false" Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
            <Description>Support non-compliant formats</Description>
          </Option>
          <Option Short="" Long="vab" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
            <Description>Path to the VAB file. Ignore if VH and VB paths are 
provided.</Description>
          </Option>
          <Option Short="" Long="vb" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="scalar"
ClrType="System.String">
            <Description>Path to the VB file (VAB body). Ignore if VAB path is 
provided.</Description>
          </Option>
          <Option Short="v" Long="verbosity" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogLevel">
            <Description>Logging output verbosity</Description>
          </Option>
          <Option Short="" Long="vh" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="scalar"
ClrType="System.String">
            <Description>Path to the VH file (VAB header). Ignore if VAB path is
provided.</Description>
          </Option>
        </Parameters>
      </Command>
      <!--IMPORT-->
      <Command Name="import" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="SceneGate.Hinox.Utils.Audio.ImportSingleVabCommand" 
Settings="SceneGate.Hinox.Utils.Audio.ImportSingleVabCommand+Settings">
        <Description>Import audio files into VAB or VH/VB format</Description>
        <Parameters>
          <Option Short="" Long="autodetect-vag" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
            <Description>If set, it tries to autodetect VAG headers in audio 
files</Description>
          </Option>
          <Option Short="f" Long="files" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
            <Description>Path to the files.yml with the audio paths to 
import</Description>
          </Option>
          <Option Short="" Long="header" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
            <Description>Path to the vab.yml with the VAB header 
information</Description>
          </Option>
          <Option Short="" Long="out-vab" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
            <Description>Export content as VAB format into the provided 
path</Description>
          </Option>
          <Option Short="" Long="out-vb" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
            <Description>Export the body container as VB format into the 
provided path</Description>
          </Option>
          <Option Short="" Long="out-vh" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
            <Description>Export the header as VH format into the provided 
path</Description>
          </Option>
          <Option Short="v" Long="verbosity" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogLevel">
            <Description>Logging output verbosity</Description>
          </Option>
        </Parameters>
      </Command>
      <!--TEST-->
      <Command Name="test" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="SceneGate.Hinox.Utils.Audio.TestVabCommand" 
Settings="SceneGate.Hinox.Utils.Audio.TestVabCommand+Settings">
        <Description>Test reading and writing VAB files</Description>
        <Parameters>
          <Argument Name="PATH" Position="0" Required="false" Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.String">
            <Description>Path to the directory containing VAB or VH/VB 
files</Description>
          </Argument>
          <Option Short="r" Long="recursive" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
            <Description>Indicates whether to search in subdirectories 
recursively</Description>
          </Option>
          <Option Short="v" Long="verbosity" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogLevel">
            <Description>Logging output verbosity</Description>
          </Option>
        </Parameters>
      </Command>
    </Command>
  </Command>
</Model>
Success!" to type "System.Xml.XmlDocument". Error: "The specified node cannot be inserted as the valid child of this node, because the specified node is the wrong type."
